parameters.content:
## Ventas IA - WhatsApp Agent

**Propósito:** Agente conversacional de IA que atiende clientes potenciales vía WhatsApp y genera cotizaciones de vehículos siguiendo un flujo de 7 pasos.

**Webhook path:** `ventas-ia-inbound` (POST)

**Variables de n8n requeridas:**
- `WA_API_URL` → URL de Meta Cloud API con el Phone Number ID
- `WA_BEARER_TOKEN` → Token de acceso Meta Cloud API
- `CRM_BASE_URL` → URL base del CRM sin slash final
- `CRM_WEBHOOK_SECRET` → Valor de CONVERSATIONS_WEBHOOK_SECRET
- `VENTAS_WEBHOOK_SECRET` → Valor de VENTAS_WEBHOOK_SECRET
- `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` → Clave API de Anthropic

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: $json.phone, type: 'text', text: { preview_url: false, body: $json._reply_msg } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ event_type: 'agent_message', source: 'ventas_ia', source_channel: 'whatsapp', phone: $node['Parse LLM Response'].json.phone, session_id: $node['Parse LLM Response'].json.session_id, text: $node['Parse LLM Response'].json._reply_msg, payload: { action: 'continue', paso_actual: $node['Parse LLM Response'].json._paso_actual } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, action: 'continue', phone: $node['Parse LLM Response'].json.phone, paso_actual: $node['Parse LLM Response'].json._paso_actual }) }}

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: $node['Parse LLM Response'].json.phone, type: 'text', text: { preview_url: false, body: $node['Parse LLM Response'].json._reply_msg } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ event_type: 'agent_message', source: 'ventas_ia', source_channel: 'whatsapp', phone: $node['Parse LLM Response'].json.phone, session_id: $node['Parse LLM Response'].json.session_id, text: $node['Parse LLM Response'].json._reply_msg, payload: { action: 'save_lead', paso_actual: 7 } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, action: 'save_lead', phone: $node['Parse LLM Response'].json.phone }) }}

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: $json.phone, type: 'text', text: { preview_url: false, body: $json._reply_msg } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ event_type: 'agent_message', source: 'ventas_ia', source_channel: 'whatsapp', phone: $node['Parse LLM Response'].json.phone, session_id: $node['Parse LLM Response'].json.session_id, text: $node['Parse LLM Response'].json._reply_msg, payload: { action: 'escalate', paso_actual: $node['Parse LLM Response'].json._paso_actual, needs_human: true } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, action: 'escalate', phone: $node['Parse LLM Response'].json.phone, needs_human: true }) }}

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: $json.phone, type: 'text', text: { preview_url: false, body: $json._reply_msg } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ telefono: $json.phone, session_id: $json.session_id, canal: 'whatsapp', nombre_cliente: $json._lead_data.nombre_cliente || null, detalle: 'Cliente redirigido al taller desde agente de ventas WhatsApp' }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT id, COALESCE(nombre,'') as nombre, COALESCE(apellido,'') as apellido, COALESCE(email,'') as email, COALESCE(celular,'') as celular FROM clientes WHERE celular = '{{ $('Parse Input & Load History').first().json.phone }}' LIMIT 1

SELECT v.id, COALESCE(v.placas,'') as plate, COALESCE(v.anio,0) as year, COALESCE(v.color,'') as color, COALESCE(v.kilometraje,0) as current_mileage, COALESCE(m.name,'') as brand, COALESCE(mo.name,'') as model FROM vehiculos v LEFT JOIN marcas m ON v.marca_id = m.id LEFT JOIN modelos mo ON v.modelo_id = mo.id INNER JOIN clientes c ON v.cliente_id = c.id WHERE c.celular = '{{ $('Parse Input & Load History').first().json.phone }}' AND v.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY v.id ASC
